key_components: Citation dataclass with citation_number, source_id, cited_text fields
ValidationResult dataclass with score (0.0-1.0), flags, citations, provider, raw_answer
ValidationProvider Protocol with async validate() and is_available() methods
ValidationService class implementing primary→fallback failover pattern
Retry logic with exponential backoff (3 retries, 2^attempt delay)
Citation parsing from AskResult.references with defensive attribute access
Score extraction via regex patterns supporting multiple formats
Doctrinal flag detection from response text

patterns_discovered.name: Protocol-based Dependency Injection
patterns_discovered.description: ValidationProvider Protocol defines interface; NotebookLMProvider and fallback provider implement it. ValidationService accepts providers as constructor arguments.

patterns_discovered.name: Exponential Backoff Retry Logic
patterns_discovered.description: Failed NotebookLM calls retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff delays (1s, 2s, 4s). Last exception is captured and re-raised.

patterns_discovered.name: Lazy Client Initialization
patterns_discovered.description: NotebookLM client created on first use via _get_client(); initialisation errors logged and propagated.

patterns_discovered.name: Defensive Attribute Access
patterns_discovered.description: getattr() with defaults and chained fallbacks used to safely extract values from loosely-typed external objects (AskResult).

patterns_discovered.name: Failover/Fallback Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Primary provider attempted first; if unavailable or fails, fallback provider silently invoked.

patterns_discovered.name: Async-to-Sync Thread Bridge
patterns_discovered.description: asyncio.to_thread() wraps synchronous NotebookLM.ask() for use in async context.

gotchas_discovered.description: If regex parsing fails to extract score, _extract_score() silently returns 0.5. This masks parsing issues and could report false moderate confidence.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Log score extraction failures; consider raising exception instead of returning default

gotchas_discovered.issue: Fragile regex patterns for score extraction
gotchas_discovered.description: Score extraction relies on Portuguese keywords (pontuação, precisão) and numeric formats. Response format changes could break parsing.
_MAX_RETRIES and _BACKOFF_BASE are module-level constants. Cannot be configured per instance or environment.
NotebookLM client and AskResult types not imported; defensive getattr() is required but reduces type safety.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add type stubs or use TYPE_CHECKING block

gotchas_discovered.issue: Silent primary provider failure in failover
gotchas_discovered.description: When primary provider fails, only a warning is logged. No metrics or alerting for repeated failures.
gotchas_discovered.impact: Difficult to detect and investigate provider health issues in production

approach_outcome.completion_summary: Fully implemented ValidationProvider Protocol, ValidationResult/Citation dataclasses, and ValidationService with primary→fallback failover logic. NotebookLMProvider includes retry logic with exponential backoff, health checks, RPCError handling, and citation parsing from references.

recommendations.recommendation: Make _MAX_RETRIES and _BACKOFF_BASE configurable via NotebookLMProvider constructor or environment variables
recommendations.rationale: Allows tuning retry behavior per environment without code changes

recommendations.recommendation: Add schema validation for NotebookLM response structure before parsing
recommendations.rationale: Prevents silent failures and provides clear error messages when response format changes

recommendations.recommendation: Add metrics/counters for retry attempts, fallback invocations, and provider failures
recommendations.rationale: Enables monitoring of provider health and SLA compliance in production

recommendations.recommendation: Extract regex patterns to named constants at module level with documentation
recommendations.rationale: Improves maintainability and makes pattern changes traceable

recommendations.recommendation: Log score/flag extraction failures separately from validation failures
recommendations.rationale: Distinguishes parsing issues from API failures; aids debugging

recommendations.recommendation: Create type stubs or Protocol classes for NotebookLM and AskResult objects
recommendations.rationale: Improves IDE support and type checking; documents expected interface

recommendations.recommendation: Consider implementing circuit breaker pattern on top of retry logic
recommendations.rationale: Fails fast after repeated failures instead of waiting through all retries
